ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-26-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP (D) WAS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL INDICATED THAT THE CASE IS AT-ISSUE ON THE RECORD. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 9/12/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 9/2/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PATHOLOGY TO BE PROVIDED BY 6/13/05. DEPOSITION TO BE TAKEN BY RECENTLY SERVED DEFENDANT TO BE COMPLETED BY 6/17/05. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 7/29/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: SARAH LERSCHEN, CSR #6213 (206)
